news.t: 3EDGE Asset Management Announces the Launch of Four Actively Managed ETFs

overview.description: The 3EDGE Dynamic Hard Assets ETF (EDGH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed asset allocation fund that invests in various hard assets. The fund seeks capital appreciation and limits losses depending on market conditions. EDGH was launched on Oct 3, 2024 and is issued by 3Edge.

data.title: 3EDGE Asset Management Announces the Launch of Four Actively Managed ETFs
data.text: NAPLES, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--3EDGE Asset Management, a leader in active and tactical asset management solutions, announced the official launch of its highly anticipated suite of 3EDGE ETFs. Since go...
